name: Registry & Methodology
rationale: The crediting program (registry) and the specific methodology together determine the rules and rigor under which credits are generated. A good project under a weak methodology is still a weak credit.
data_source: Token metadata -- registry ID + methodology ID (on-chain native via mapping table)

methodology_modifiers.condition: Methodology category approved under ICVCM CCP
Active integrity review or revision process
Published research demonstrates systematic overcrediting (e.g., West et al. 2023 for REDD+)

notes: Final score is clamped to [0, 100] after applying modifiers.
Registry-to-tier mapping is maintained in data/mappings/registry-to-tier.json and expected to evolve as ICVCM assessments proceed.
